allow: Bash(file /Users/cynthiac/Development/pause/assets/icon.png && python3 -c "import struct,zlib; d=open\('/Users/cynthiac/Development/pause/assets/icon.png','rb'\).read\(\); print\('size:', struct.unpack\('>II', d[16:24]\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "
import zlib, struct

data = open\('/Users/cynthiac/Development/pause/assets/icon.png','rb'\).read\(\)
i = 8
chunks = {}
while i < len\(data\):
    length = struct.unpack\('>I', data[i:i+4]\)[0]
    ctype = data[i+4:i+8].decode\(\)
    cdata = data[i+8:i+8+length]
    chunks.setdefault\(ctype, []\).append\(cdata\)
    i += 12 + length

raw = zlib.decompress\(b''.join\(chunks['IDAT']\)\)
W, H = 32, 32
found = []
for y in range\(H\):
    row_start = y * \(1 + W*4\)
    for x in range\(W\):
        px = row_start + 1 + x*4
        r,g,b,a = raw[px], raw[px+1], raw[px+2], raw[px+3]
        if a > 10:
            found.append\(\(x,y,r,g,b,a\)\)
print\(f'Total non-transparent pixels: {len\(found\)}'\)
if found:
    print\('Sample:', found[:5]\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import zlib, struct
data = open\('/Users/cynthiac/Development/pause/assets/icon.png','rb'\).read\(\)
i = 8; chunks = {}
while i < len\(data\):
    length = struct.unpack\('>I', data[i:i+4]\)[0]
    ctype = data[i+4:i+8].decode\(\)
    chunks.setdefault\(ctype, []\).append\(data[i+8:i+8+length]\)
    i += 12 + length
raw = zlib.decompress\(b''.join\(chunks['IDAT']\)\)
W,H = struct.unpack\('>II', chunks['IHDR'][0][0:8]\)
print\(f'Size: {W}x{H}'\)
found = [\(x,y,raw[y*\(1+W*4\)+1+x*4:y*\(1+W*4\)+1+x*4+4]\) for y in range\(H\) for x in range\(W\) if raw[y*\(1+W*4\)+1+x*4+3] > 10]
print\(f'Non-transparent pixels: {len\(found\)}'\)
if found: print\('Sample:', found[:3]\)
")
